languages.text: If an enemy dodged your weapon attack, your next attack against them can't be dodged and deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} base damage. This effect applies to allies during extra turns provided by you

traits.locale_text: If an enemy dodged your weapon attack, your next attack against them can't be dodged and deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} base damage. This effect applies to allies during extra turns provided by you

languages.text:
Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.

Whenever the user dodges the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base damage and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an extra turn, that ally also gains this effect.

Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.

Whenever the user grants an ally an extra turn, that ally also gains this effect.

Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.

languages.text:
Когда цель {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняется{/g} от атаки оружием обладателя аугмента, его следующая атака по этой цели наносит на +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} больше базового {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g}, и от нее нельзя уклониться.
Когда обладатель аугмента предоставляет союзнику {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}дополнительный ход{/g}, этот союзник также получает этот эффект.

Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.

languages.text:
Cada vez que el objetivo {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} el ataque del arma del usuario, su próximo ataque contra ese mismo objetivo inflige +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} básico adicional y no puede esquivarse.
Cada vez que el usuario otorga un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}turno extra{/g} a un aliado, dicho aliado gana también este efecto.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.

Cada vez que el objetivo {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} el ataque del arma del usuario, su próximo ataque contra ese mismo objetivo inflige +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} básico adicional y no puede esquivarse.
Cada vez que el usuario otorga un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}turno extra{/g} a un aliado, dicho aliado gana también este efecto.

languages.text:
Wenn das Ziel dem Waffenangriff des Nutzers {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweicht{/g}, verursacht sein nächster Angriff gegen dieses Ziel +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} Basis{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}schaden{/g} und dem Angriff kann nicht ausgewichen werden.
Gewährt der Nutzer einem Verbündeten einen {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}Zusatzzug{/g}, erhält dieser den Effekt ebenfalls.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.

Gewährt der Nutzer einem Verbündeten einen {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}Zusatzzug{/g}, erhält dieser den Effekt ebenfalls.

languages.text:
Hedef, kullanıcının silah saldırısından {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçındığında{/g} kullanıcının o hedefe yapacağı bir sonraki saldırı +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} daha fazla taban {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir ve bu saldırıdan kaçınılamaz.
Kullanıcı, bir dost birime {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}ek tur{/g} kazandırdığında o dost birim bu etkiyi de kazanır.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.

traits.locale_text:
Hedef, kullanıcının silah saldırısından {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçındığında{/g} kullanıcının o hedefe yapacağı bir sonraki saldırı +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} daha fazla taban {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir ve bu saldırıdan kaçınılamaz.
Kullanıcı, bir dost birime {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}ek tur{/g} kazandırdığında o dost birim bu etkiyi de kazanır.

languages.text:
Lorsqu'une cible {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} l'attaque armée de l'utilisateur, sa prochaine attaque contre cette cible inflige +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de base et ne peut pas être esquivée.
Chaque fois que l'utilisateur octroie un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}tour supplémentaire{/g} à un allié, celui-ci bénéficie également de cet effet.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.

traits.locale_text:
Lorsqu'une cible {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} l'attaque armée de l'utilisateur, sa prochaine attaque contre cette cible inflige +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de base et ne peut pas être esquivée.
Chaque fois que l'utilisateur octroie un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}tour supplémentaire{/g} à un allié, celui-ci bénéficie également de cet effet.

languages.text:
每当目标{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}了使用者的武器攻击时，使用者对该目标的下一次攻击额外造成{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263}点基础{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}，且无法被闪避。
每当使用者赋予一名盟友{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}额外回合{/g}时，该盟友也会获得此效果。
languages.original_text:
Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.

traits.locale_text:
每当目标{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}了使用者的武器攻击时，使用者对该目标的下一次攻击额外造成{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263}点基础{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}，且无法被闪避。
每当使用者赋予一名盟友{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}额外回合{/g}时，该盟友也会获得此效果。

languages.text:
対象が使用者の武器攻撃を{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}するたびに、その対象に対する使用者の次の攻撃は基本{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}が+{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263}増加し、回避できなくなる。
使用者が味方に{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}追加ターン{/g}を付与するたびに、その味方もこの効果を得る。
languages.original_text:
Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.

対象が使用者の武器攻撃を{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}するたびに、その対象に対する使用者の次の攻撃は基本{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}が+{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263}増加し、回避できなくなる。
使用者が味方に{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}追加ターン{/g}を付与するたびに、その味方もこの効果を得る。
